top_objections.text: It is a safe choice because it is gentle for the scalp but you can use better shampoo to clean the product build up if you use products.

@Clortezz  bro i am scratching my head all the time it's irritating.. I used shampoo 2 days in between because of this irritation... And when I scratch my head some sticky kind of substance is filled in my nails.

@cl3o224  It can cause frizzy or dry hair, and possibly weakened hair so it can lead to more breakage. 
Those side effects tend to get worse the more perm you do, so maybe for your 1st one you won't experience any.

In my 30s and I've not used shampoo since I was a small child. Used to get allergic reactions to something in them. So just stopped using them. 

All my male friends and colleagues my age and younger are losing their hair. Mine is exactly the same as it's always been. Very thick, full and long.

top_positive_signals.text: I highly recommend to install a shower filter to help not just your hair but your skin. I recently got the aqua bliss shower filter and I immediately noticed a change. My hair is softer and wasnt as dry compared to before. If you live in a city or your water is harsh, GET ONE.

I love watching your videos even though I'm a girl. I hope you know that all the advice you give is a wonderfully condensed and straightforward version of most "girl care" content, yet I am somehow more drawn to your style of videos for their simplicity. Keep up the incredible work!

no shampoo no extra products is also an option (it will look greasy for sometime then hair will produce natural oils making it have texture and no greasiness) it will also make your life much more easy trust me I've done this for 1 month and im seeing results my dandruff has reduced too

I have begun to take care of my hair very much. I have wavy hair and I use sulfate free schampoo, conditioner, leave in conditioner, and also a hair mask. Everything but the conditioner I only do once a week. Conditioner is every other day. It has been amazing result. Do not shower your hair in too warm water, also end every shower with icecold water, to lock the moisture in your hair better. Last but not least, you got to have products designed for your hair!
Love your longer videos. Keep it up man💪🫂

Skipping shampoo days has been a game-changer for me. I actually track the results with nordic biolabs sometimes to see the overall impact on my hair health. Great advice on adjusting washing frequency!

One thing Ive always questioned is should I be shampooing my hair daily if I go to the gym or have a long day of work where my hair is built up with dirt and sweat. Should I shampoo or let it build up?

This helped me alot. Literally until id stared college i had no idea my hair curls when it gets longer.

I have like 10 different ones, and I will tell you something, it doesn’t matter, just go out there find one you love and rock them with confidence.

"The salon guy" has some tutorials on how to make straight hair wavy.
The most important thing is to ask your hairdresser to create layers next time you go there.
